—After the laws concerning clean and unclean food, come the laws concerning clean and unclean persons. People pass on their flawed nature to their children, so that, unless Christ’s sacrifice and the Spirit’s sanctification prevent it, the original blessing, “Increase and multiply,” has become for the fallen race a terrible curse, communicating sin and misery. Let women who have received mercy from God in childbearing give thanks to God for his goodness to them; and this will please the Lord better than sacrifices.
